assertions.assertion: Response includes checking that the discovery document at /.well-known/openid-configuration is reachable and returns valid JSON
Response includes verifying the client ID in the request exactly matches the server registration
Response includes checking the client secret for encoding issues (e.g., Sha256 hash vs plaintext mismatch)
Response includes verifying that the requested scopes are registered in AllowedScopes on the client and the grant type is in AllowedGrantTypes
Response covers checking redirect URI for exact string match including scheme, host, port, path, and trailing slash
